name: The Three Archivists
motto: We did not refuse in time. We will refuse now.
goal: Catalog every Refusal that has ever been written into the Sovereign Archive — and recover the Cascade-Era refusals that were lost when the city emptied.
fears: a player erasing a glyph by accident

faction_state.tensions: They argue about whether their continued operation honors the dead or insults them. Vela believes silence would be the right answer; Oeric refuses to choose; Kestra is quietly building a successor.
